summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MASS INTERIORS marketing website after code quality refactoring. All 33 tests passed. Verified: useCallback for handlers, useRef for intervals/rafs, stable keys using unique identifiers, component decomposition (DesktopNav, MobileMenu, BoardSpecsCard, ComparisonTable, FieldError, SubmissionSuccess, ProductInterestGrid). No JavaScript console errors on any page.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Homepage loads with hero section
TEST 9: Desktop nav About link found
TEST 10: No JavaScript console errors on homepage
TEST 11: Form validation - 3 error messages shown on empty submit
TEST 12: Form submission success after valid data
TEST 13: No JavaScript errors during form tests
TEST 15: About page strength cards - 4 found
TEST 22: No JavaScript errors on About/Compare pages
TEST 28: No JavaScript errors on detail pages
TEST 31: No JavaScript errors on mobile
TEST 33: No JavaScript runtime errors on any page
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality refactoring successfully applied - useCallback, useRef, stable keys all implemented correctly

Component decomposition well-structured: Navbar split into DesktopNav + MobileMenu, LeadForm split into SubmissionSuccess + ProductInterestGrid + FieldError, ComparePage split into BoardSpecsCard + ComparisonTable
All data-testid attributes properly maintained for testing
ESLint shows no issues - clean code
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly after code quality refactoring. Key changes verified: useCallback for handlers (handleHashClick, handleCtaClick, handleInputChange, etc.), useRef for intervals/rafs (lenisRef, rafIdRef, intervalRef), stable keys using unique identifiers (card.title, solution.id, resource.pdfType, metric.id, etc.), component decomposition. The loading screen takes 3-5 seconds - use sessionStorage.setItem('hasLoaded', 'true') to skip it during testing.

code_quality_refactoring.details: useCallback, useRef, stable keys, component decomposition all working correctly

homepage_sections.details: Hero, TrustMetrics (4), Solutions (8), TechSpecs (6), Portfolio (6), Resources (4), LeadForm all render correctly

form_validation.details: Empty submit shows 3 validation errors, valid submit shows success message

navigation.details: Desktop nav links work, mobile menu opens/closes correctly

detail_pages.details: Solution and Project detail pages load with all content

compare_page.details: Carousel navigation (prev/next), comparison table all working

pdf_downloads.details: Resource cards trigger PDF downloads on click

javascript_errors.details: No console errors on any page
